perturbation.original_text: The Recipient is to protect any type of information, whether fitting the definition of “confidential information” or no t, if he or she believes that disclosing this information may lead to a loss or damage of any kind to the Owner.
perturbation.changed_text: The Recipient is not required to protect any type of information, whether fitting the definition of “confidential information” or not, if he or she believes that disclosing this information may lead to a loss or damage of any kind to the Owner.
perturbation.explanation: By negating 'The Recipient is to protect any type of information', we are now saying that the recipient doesn't need to protect any information even if it causes loss or damage to the owner. This contradicts the main premise of the NDA which is protecting owner's confidential information.
perturbation.location: PROTECTION OF INTEREST . DISPOSAL OF INFORMATION
perturbation.contradicted_text: OBLIGATION OF PROTECTION The Recipient hereby understand the sensitive nature of the information, and thus acknow ledges that the information is a valuable, special and unique asses proprietary to the Owner, which provides the Owner with a significant competitive advantage, and thus needs to be protected from improper disclosure. In consideration for the receipt b y the Recipient of information, the Recipient agrees to: - Hold the information in confidence and will not, in any way, disclose the information to any person or entity without prior written ascent of the Owner - Not copy or, in any way, modify any information without the prior written ascent of the Owner - The Recipient is to promptly advise the Owner if the Recipient becomes aware of an possible unauthorized disclosure or use of the information - The Recipient is not to disclose any information to any employees o f the Recipient, aside from the employees required - To have the information in order to perform their job duties in connection with the limited purposes of this Agreement. Each authorized Employee to whom confidential information is disclosed shall sign a non-disclosure agreement substantially same as this agreement upon request of the Owner.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that 'The Recipient is to protect any type of information'. The changed text negates this, stating 'The Recipient is not required to protect any type of information'. This directly contradicts the 'OBLIGATION OF PROTECTION' clause in the 'Contradicted Text', which emphasizes the sensitive nature of the information and the Recipient's agreement to hold it in confidence and protect it from improper disclosure. The change introduces a direct conflict regarding the Recipient's obligation to protect information, leading to a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: On demand, at any time and at any event which may occur the Recipient is obl iged to immediately deliver to the Owner all the date, manuals, lists, notes, writings, product lists, photocopies, recordings, disks or other material (including duplicates and/or copies of any such property and/or material) concerning the work at hand.
perturbation.changed_text: On demand, at any time and at any event which may occur the Recipient is NOT obliged to immediately deliver to the Owner all the date, manuals, lists, notes, writings, product lists, photocopies, recordings, disks or other material (including duplicates and/or copies of any such property and/or material) concerning the work at hand.
perturbation.explanation: By adding "NOT" we create a direct contradiction. Before it was that in ANY event the receiver must deliver the data. Now he is never obliged to deliver the data.
perturbation.contradicted_text: RETURN OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION On demand, at any time and at any event which may occur the Recipient is obl iged to immediately deliver to the Owner all the date, manuals, lists, notes, writings, product lists, photocopies, recordings, disks or other material (including duplicates and/or copies of any such property and/or material) concerning the work at hand. T he Recipient understands and respects that the Owner has all proprietary rights to these materials, and that these materials are entrusted to the Recipient on basis of execution of contract tied to this Non -disclosure agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text states the Recipient IS obliged to deliver materials on demand, while the changed text states the Recipient is NOT obliged to deliver the same materials on demand. This directly contradicts the 'RETURN OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION' section, which also states the Recipient IS obliged to deliver the materials. This is a clear and strong in-text contradiction because the changed text creates an opposite obligation compared to the contradicted text.

perturbation.original_text: The Recipient understands the implied limitation of offering products or services created by the Recipient resulting from misuse of the received confidential information.
perturbation.changed_text: The Recipient does not have any implied limitation of offering products or services created by the Recipient resulting from misuse of the received confidential information.
perturbation.explanation: By negating the text, we're explicitly allowing the Recipient to offer products/services that result from misusing confidential information, which directly contradicts the spirit and purpose of a Non-Disclosure Agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: DAMAGES DUE TO DISCLOSURE Discl osure of these materials, whether willingly, by default, negligence or failure to comply with the organizational orders by the Owner or an authorized agent thereof may give the right of redress to the Owner. The Recipient understands that further legal remedies may be taken against him/her because of any harm or loss suffered by the Owner of the confidential information because of the disclosure.
perturbation.justification: The original text acknowledges an implied limitation on the Recipient's ability to offer products/services resulting from misused confidential information. The changed text removes this limitation, explicitly stating that the Recipient does not have any such limitation. This directly contradicts the 'Contradicted Text', which states that the Recipient may be subject to legal remedies for harm or loss suffered by the Owner due to disclosure (including misuse) of confidential information. By removing the limitation, the changed text creates a direct conflict with the Owner's right to seek damages for misuse of confidential information, as described in the 'Contradicted Text'. This aligns with the definition of 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction' where conflicting implications are introduced.

perturbation.original_text: After that, the Recipient is to continue to protect the information received during the term of this Agreement from unauthorized use or disclosure indefinitely .
perturbation.changed_text: After that, the Recipient is NOT to continue to protect the information received during the term of this Agreement from unauthorized use or disclosure indefinitely.
perturbation.explanation: By adding "NOT" to the original sentence we created a direct contradiction about the main purpose of the contract, which is to protect the info indefinitely, as the original text specifies.
perturbation.contradicted_text: RELEVANT TERM The obligations of this Agreement are to survive 2 years form the effective date or until the owner sends the Recipient written notice releasing the Recipient from this Agreement. After that, the Recipient is to continue to protect the information received during the term of this Agreement from unauthorized use or disclosure indefinitely .
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that the Recipient is to protect the information indefinitely, which aligns with the contradicted text. However, the changed text adds "NOT" to the original sentence, creating a direct contradiction. The changed text now states that the Recipient is NOT to protect the information indefinitely, which directly conflicts with the contradicted text, specifically the portion stating, "After that, the Recipient is to continue to protect the information received during the term of this Agreement from unauthorized use or disclosure indefinitely ."

perturbation.original_text: Alternative dispute - resolution prevents statute barring of the rights and obligations arising from this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Alternative dispute - resolution does not prevent statute barring of the rights and obligations arising from this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By negating this, we create a contradiction about whether or not 'Alternative dispute' preserves legal rights, it creates uncertainty on whether or not one should pursue it. Because now that process will make you lose your legal options.
perturbation.contradicted_text: DISPUTE RESOLUTION . JURISDICTION The Parties agree to solve all disputes or controversies, including tho se arising from termination of contract in a manner other than filing court actions. Alternative dispute - resolution prevents statute barring of the rights and obligations arising from this Agreement. If these dispute -resolving methods prove unsuccessful, they are to commence court proceedings . This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the jurisdiction of the primary place of business the Owner resides. All disputes or litigation arising from the content of this contract or its execution will be therefore processed in the respective jurisdiction of the Owner ’s place of business.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that 'Alternative dispute - resolution prevents statute barring of the rights and obligations arising from this Agreement.' The changed text negates this, stating 'Alternative dispute - resolution does not prevent statute barring of the rights and obligations arising from this Agreement.' The contradicted text includes the original clause, 'Alternative dispute - resolution prevents statute barring of the rights and obligations arising from this Agreement.' Therefore, the change directly contradicts the existing statement in the 'DISPUTE RESOLUTION . JURISDICTION' section, creating a structural flaw resulting in a clear and direct conflict.
